title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IRCTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IRCTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
